verses.ar: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِِ
verses.en: In the Name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

verses.ar: أَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّ آلِ مُحَمَّد
verses.en: O Allah! Bless Muhammad and his progeny.

verses.ar: اَللّـهُمَّ يا مَنْ دَلَعَ لِسانَ الصَّباحِ بِنُطْقِ تَبَلُّجِهِ
verses.en: Oh God, Oh He who extended the morning's tongue in the speech of its dawning

verses.ar: وَ سَرَّحَ قِطَعَ الّلَيْلِ الْمُظْلِمِ بِغَياهِبِ تَلَجْلُجِهِ
verses.en: And dispatched the fragments of the dark night into the gloom of its stammering

verses.ar: وَ اَتْقَنَ صُنْعَ الْفَلَكِ الدَّوّارِ في مَقاديرِ تَبَرُّجِهِ
verses.en: And made firm the structure of the turning spheres in the measures of its display

verses.ar: وَ شَعْشَعَ ضِياءَ الشَّمْسِ بِنُورِ تَاَجُّجِهِ
verses.en: And beamed forth the brightness of the sun through the light of its blazing!

verses.ar: يا مَنْ دَلَّ عَلى ذاتِهِ بِذاتِهِ
verses.en: Oh He who demonstrates His Essence by His Essence

verses.ar: وَ تَنَزَّهَ عَنْ مُجانَسَةِ مَخْلُوقاتِهِ
verses.en: And transcends congeneity with His creatures

verses.ar: وَ جَلَّ عَنْ مُلاءَمَةِ كَيْفِيّاتِهِ
verses.en: And is exalted beyond conformity with His qualities!

verses.ar: يا مَنْ قَرُبَ مِنْ خَطَراتِ الظُّنُونِ
verses.en: Oh He who is near to the passing thoughts of opinions

verses.ar: وَ بَعُدَ عَنْ لَحَظاتِ الْعُيُونِ
verses.en: And far from the regards of eyes

verses.ar: وَ عَلِمَ بِما كانَ قَبْلَ اَنْ يَكُونَ
verses.en: And knows what will be before it comes to be!

verses.ar: يا مَنْ اَرْقَدَني في مِهادِ اَمْنِهِ وَ اَمانِهِ
verses.en: Oh He who has put me at ease in the cradle of His security and sanctuary

verses.ar: وَ اَيْقَظَني إلى ما مَنَحَني بِهِ مِنْ مِنَنِهِ وَ اِحْسانِهِ
verses.en: And awakened me to the favors and kindness that He has bestowed upon me

verses.ar: وَ كَفَّ اَكُفَّ السُّوءِ عَنّي بِيَدِهِ وَ سُلْطانِهِ
verses.en: And held me from the claws of evil with His hand and His force!

verses.ar: صَلِّ اللّـهُمَّ عَلَى الدَّليلِ اِلَيْكَ فِي اللَّيْلِ الأَلْيَلِ
verses.en: Bless, oh God, the guide to Thee in the darkest night

verses.ar: وَ الْماسِكِ مِنْ اَسْبَابِكَ بِحَبْلِ الشَّرَفِ الأَطْوَلِ
verses.en: And him who, of Thy ropes, clings to the cord of the longest nobility

verses.ar: وَ النّاصِعِ الْحَسَبِ في ذِرْوَةِ الْكاهِلِ الأَعْبَلِ
verses.en: And him whose glory is evident at the summit of stout shoulders

verses.ar: وَ الثّابِتِ الْقَدَمِ عَلى زَحاليفِها فِي الزَّمَنِ الأَوَّلِ
verses.en: And whose feet were entrenched in spite of slippery places in ancient time

verses.ar: وَ عَلى آلِهِ الأَخْيارِ الْمُصْطَفِيْنَ الأَبْرارِ
verses.en: And [bless] his household, the good, the chosen, the pious

verses.ar: وَ افْتَحِ اللّـهُمَّ لَنا مَصاريعَ الصَّباحِ
verses.en: And open for us, oh God, the leaves of morning's door

verses.ar: بِمَفاتيحِ الرَّحْمَةِ وَ الْفَلاحِ
verses.en: With the keys of mercy and prosperity!

verses.ar: وَ اَلْبِسْنِي اللّـهُمَّ مِنْ اَفْضَلِ خِلَعِ الْهِدايَةِ وَ الصَّلاحِ
verses.en: And clothe me, oh God, with the most excellent robes of guidance and righteousness!

verses.ar: وَ اَغْرِسِ اللّـهُمَّ بِعَظَمَتِكَ في شِرْبِ جَناني يَنابيعَ الخُشُوعِ
verses.en: And plant, oh God, through Thy tremendousness, the springs of humility in the watering place of my heart!

verses.ar: وَ اَجْرِ اللّـهُمَّ لِهَيْبَتِكَ مِنْ آماقي زَفَراتِ الدُّمُوعِ
verses.en: And cause to flow, oh God, because of Thy awesomeness, tears of moaning from the corner of my eyes!

verses.ar: وَ أَدِّبِ اللّـهُمَّ نَزَقَ الْخُرْقِ مِنّي بِاَزِمَّةِ الْقُنُوعِ
verses.en: And chastise, oh God, the recklessness of my clumsiness with the reins of contentment!

verses.ar: اِلـهي اِنْ لَمْ تَبْتَدِئنِي الرَّحْمَةُ مِنْكَ بِحُسْنِ التَّوْفيقِ
verses.en: My God, if mercy from Thee does not begin with fair success for me

verses.ar: فَمَنِ السّالِكُ بي اِلَيْكَ في واضِحِ الطَّريقِ
verses.en: Then who can take me to Thee upon the evident path?

verses.ar: وَ اِنْ اَسْلَمَتْني اَناتُكَ لِقائِدِ الأَمَلِ وَالْمُنى
verses.en: If Thy deligerateness would turn me over to the guide of hope and wishes

verses.ar: فَمَنِ الْمُقيلُ عَثَراتي مِنْ كَبَواتِ الْهَوى
verses.en: Then who will annul my slips from the stumbles of caprice?

verses.ar: وَ اِنْ خَذَلَني نَصْرُكَ عِنْدَ مُحارَبَةِ النَّفْسِ وَ الشَّيْطانِ
verses.en: If Thy help should forsake me in the battle with the soul and Satan

verses.ar: فَقَدْ وَكَلَني خِذْلانُكَ إلى حَيْثُ النَّصَبُ وَ الْحِرْمانُ
verses.en: Then Thy forsaking will have entrusted me to where there is hardship and deprivation

verses.ar: اِلـهي اَتَراني ما اَتَيْتُكَ إلاّ مِنْ حَيْثُ الآمالِ
verses.en: My God, dost Thou see that I have only come to Thee from the direction of hopes

verses.ar: عَلِقْتُ بِاَطْرافِ حِبالِكَ إلاّ حينَ باعَدَتْني ذُنُوبي عَنْ دارِ الْوِصالِ
verses.en: Or clung to the ends of Thy cords when my sins have driven me from the house of union?

verses.ar: فَبِئْسَ الْمَطِيَّةُ الَّتي امْتَطَتْ نَفْسي مِنْ هَواهـا
verses.en: So what an evil mount upon which my soul has mounted - its caprice!

verses.ar: فَواهاً لَها لِما سَوَّلَتْ لَها ظُنُونُها وَ مُناها
verses.en: Woe upon it for being seduced by its own opinions and wishes!

verses.ar: وَ تَبّاً لَها لِجُرْاَتِها عَلى سَيِّدِها وَ مَوْلاها
verses.en: And destruction be upon it for its audacity toward its Master and Protector!

verses.ar: اِلـهي قَرَعْتُ بابَ رَحْمَتِكَ بِيَدِ رَجائي
verses.en: My God, I have knocked upon the door of Thy mercy with the hand of my hope

verses.ar: وَ هَرَبْتُ اِلَيْكَ لاجِئاً مِنْ فَرْطِ اَهْوائي
verses.en: And fled to Thee seeking refuge from my excessive caprice

verses.ar: وَ عَلَّقْتُ بِاَطْرافِ حِبالِكَ اَنامِلَ وَلائي
verses.en: And fixed the fingers of my love to the ends of Thy cords

verses.ar: فَاْصْفَحِ اللّـهُمَّ عَمّا كُنْتُ اَجْرَمْتُهُ مِنْ زَلَلي وَ خَطائي
verses.en: So pardon, oh God, the slips and errors I have committed

verses.ar: وَ اَقِلْني مِنْ صَرْعَةِ رِدائي
verses.en: And release me from the foot-tangling of my robe

verses.ar: فَاِنَّكَ سَيِّدي وَ مَوْلاي وَ مُعْتَمَدي وَ رَجائي
verses.en: For Thou art my Master, my Protector, my Support and my Hope

verses.ar: وَ اَنْتَ غايَةُ مَطْلُوبي وَ مُناي في مُنْقَلَبي وَ مَثْواىَ
verses.en: And Thou art the object of my search and my desire in my ultimate end and stable abode

verses.ar: اِلـهي كَيْفَ تَطْرُدُ مِسْكيناً الْتَجَأَ اِلَيْكَ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ هارِباً
verses.en: My God, how couldst Thou drive away a poor beggar who seeks refuge in Thee from sins, fleeing?

verses.ar: اَمْ كَيْفَ تُخَيِّبُ مُسْتَرْشِداً قَصَدَ إلى جَنابِكَ ساعِياً
verses.en: Or how couldst Thou disappoint one seeking guidance who repairs to Thy threshold, running?

verses.ar: اَمْ كَيْفَ تَرُدُّ ظَمآناً وَرَدَ إلى حِياضِكَ شارِباً
verses.en: Or how could You reject a thirsty man who comes to Your wells to drink?

verses.ar: كَلاّ وَحِياضُكَ مُتْرَعَةٌ في ضَنْكِ الُْمُحُولِ
verses.en: Never! For Thy pools are full in the hardship of drought

verses.ar: وَ بابُكَ مَفْتُوحٌ لِلطَّلَبِ وَ الْوُغُولِ
verses.en: Thy door is open for seeking and penetration

verses.ar: وَ اَنْتَ غايَةُ الْمَسْؤولِ وَ نِهايَةُ الْمَأمُولِ
verses.en: And Thou art the goal of requests and the object of hopes

verses.ar: اِلـهي هذِهِ اَزِمَّةُ نَفْسي عَقَلْتُها بِعِقالِ مَشِيَّتِكَ
verses.en: My God, these are the reins of my soul I have bound them with the ties of Thy will

verses.ar: وَ هذِهِ اَعْباءُ ذُنُوبي دَرَأتُها بِعَفْوِكَ وَ رَحْمَتِكَ
verses.en: These are the burdens of my sins I have averted them with Thy pardon and mercy

verses.ar: وَ هذِهِ اَهْوائِي الْمُضِلَّةُ وَكَلْتُها إلى جَنابِ لُطْفِكَ وَ رَأفَتِكَ
verses.en: these are my caprices that lead astray - I have entrusted them to the threshold of Thy gentleness and kindliness

verses.ar: فَاجْعَلِ اللّـهُمَّ صَباحي هذا ناِزلاً عَلَي بِضِياءِ الْهُدى
verses.en: So make this morning of mine, oh God, descend upon me with the radiance of guidance

verses.ar: وَ بِالسَّلامَة فِي الدّينِ وَ الدُّنْيا
verses.en: and with safety in religion and this world!

verses.ar: وَ مَسائي جُنَّةً مِنْ كَيْدِ الْعِدى
verses.en: And [make] my evening a shield against the deception of enemies

verses.ar: وَ وِقايَهً مِنْ مُرْدِياتِ الْهَوى
verses.en: And a protection against the destructive blows of caprice!

verses.ar: اِنَكَ قادِرٌ عَلى ما تَشاءُ
verses.en: Thou art able over what Thou wilt!

verses.ar: تُؤتِي الْمُلْكَ مَنْ تَشاءُ ، وَ تَنْزِعُ الْمُلْكَ مِمَّنْ تَشاءُ
verses.en: Thou givest the kingdom to whom Thou wilt, and Thou seizest the kingdom from whom Thou wilt

verses.ar: وَ تُعِزُّ مَنْ تَشاءُ ، وَ تُذِلُّ مَنْ تَشاءُ
verses.en: Thou exaltest whom Thou wilt, and Thou abasest whom Thou wilt

verses.ar: بِيَدِكَ الْخَيْرُ اِنَّـكَ عَلى كُلِّ شَيْء قَديرٌ
verses.en: In Thy hand is the good, Thou art powerful over all things

verses.ar: تُولِجُ اللَيْلَ في النَّهارِ ، وَ تُولِجُ النَّهارَ فِي اللَّيْلِ
verses.en: Thou makest the night to enter into the day, and Thou makest the day to enter into the night

verses.ar: وَ تُخْرِجُ الْحَيَّ مِنَ الْمَيِّتِ ، وَ تُخْرِجُ الْمَيِّتَ مِنَ الْحَي
verses.en: Thou bringest forth the living from the dead, and Thou bringest forth dead from the living

verses.ar: وَ تَرْزُقُ مَنْ تَشاءُ بِغَيْرِ حِساب
verses.en: and Thou providest whomsoever Thou wilt without reckoning

verses.ar: لا اِلـهَ إلاّ اَنْتَ سُبْحانَكَ اللّـهُمَّ وَ بِحَمْدِكَ
verses.en: There is no god but Thou! Glory be to Thee, oh God, and Thine is the praise!

verses.ar: مَنْ ذا يَعْرِفُ قَدْرَكَ فَلا يَخافُكَ
verses.en: Who knows Thy measure without fearing Thee?

verses.ar: وَ مَن ذا يَعْلَمُ ما اَنْتَ فَلا يَهابُكَ
verses.en: Who knows what Thou art without awe of Thee?

verses.ar: اَلَّفْتَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ الْفِرَقَ
verses.en: Through Thy power Thou hast joined disparate things

verses.ar: وَ فَلَقْتَ بِلُطْفِكَ الْفَلَقَ
verses.en: And through Thy gentleness Thou hast cleaved apart the daybreak

verses.ar: وَ اَنَرْتَ بِكَرَمِكَ دَياجِي الْغَسَقِ
verses.en: And through Thy generosity Thou hast illumined the dark shrouds of night

verses.ar: وَ اَنْهَرْتَ الْمِياهَ مِنَ الصُّمِّ الصَّياخيدِ عَذْباً وَ اُجاجاً
verses.en: Thou hast made waters, sweet and salt, flow forth from hard shining stones

verses.ar: وَ اَنْزَلْتَ مِنَ الْمُعْصِراتِ ماءً ثَجّاجاً
verses.en: And sent down out of rain-clouds water cascading

verses.ar: وَ جَعَلْتَ الشَّمْسَ وَ الْقَمَرَ لِلْبَرِيَّةِ سِراجاً وَهّاجاً
verses.en: And appointed the sun and moon a blazing lamp for the creatures

verses.ar: مِنْ غَيْرِ اَنْ تُمارِسَ فيما ابْتَدَأتَ بِهِ لُغُوباً وَ لا عِلاجاً
verses.en: Without experiencing in that which Thou originated either weariness or effort

verses.ar: فَيا مَنْ تَوَحَّدَ بِالْعِزِّ وَ الْبَقاءِ
verses.en: So, oh He who is alone in might and subsistence

verses.ar: قَهَرَ عِبادَهُ بِالْمَوْتِ وَ الْفَناءِ
verses.en: And dominates His slaves with death and annihilation

verses.ar: صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّد وَ آلِهِ الاَْتْقِياءِ
verses.en: Bless Muhammad and his household, the godfearing

verses.ar: وَ اسْمَعْ نِدائي ، وَ اسْتَجِبْ دُعائي
verses.en: And answer my supplication hear my call

verses.ar: وَ حَقِّقْ بِفَضْلِكَ اَمَلي وَ رَجائي
verses.en: And actualize through Thy bounty my hope and desire

verses.ar: يا خَيْرَ مَنْ دُعِي لِكَشْفِ الضُّرِّ
verses.en: Oh best of those who is called to remove affliction

verses.ar: وَ الْمَأمُولِ لِكُلِّ عُسْر وَ يُسْر
verses.en: And object of hope in every difficulty and ease!

verses.ar: بِكَ اَنْزَلْتُ حاجَتي فَلا تَرُدَّني مِنْ سَنِيِّ مَواهِبِكَ خائِباً
verses.en: I have stated my need, so do not reject me, oh my master, despairing of Thy exalted gifts

verses.ar: يا كَريمُ ، يا كَريمُ ، يا كَريمُ
verses.en: Oh All-generous! Oh All-generous! Oh All-generous!

verses.ar: بِرَحْمَتِكَ يا اَرْحَمَ الرّاحِمينَ
verses.en: By Thy mercy, oh Most Merciful of the merciful!

verses.ar: وَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلى خَيْرِ خَلْقِهِ مُحَمَّد وَ آلِهِ اَجْمَعينَ
verses.en: And God bless the best of His creatures, Muhammad, and all his household!

verses.ar: ثمّ اسجد و قل : اِلـهي قَلْبي مَحْجُوبٌ
verses.en: Then prostrate and say: My God, my heart is veiled

verses.ar: وَ نَفْسي مَعْيُوبٌ
verses.en: My soul is deficient

verses.ar: وَ عَقْلي مَغْلُوبٌ
verses.en: My intelligence is defeated

verses.ar: وَ هَوائي غالِبٌ
verses.en: My caprice is triumphant

verses.ar: وَ طاعَتي قَليلٌ
verses.en: My obedience is little

verses.ar: وَ مَعْصِيَتي كَثيرٌ
verses.en: My disobedience is much

verses.ar: وَ لِساني مُقِرٌّ بِالذُّنُوبِ
verses.en: And my tongue acknowledges sins

verses.ar: فَكَيْفَ حيلَتي يا سَتّارَ الْعُيُوبِ
verses.en: So what am I to do? Oh He who covers defects!

verses.ar: وَ يا عَلاّمَ الْغُيُوبِ
verses.en: Oh He who knows the unseen things!

verses.ar: وَ يا كاشِفَ الْكُرُوبِ
verses.en: Oh He who removes troubles

verses.ar: اِغْفِرْ ذُنُوبي كُلَّها بِحُرْمَةِ مُحَمَّد وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
verses.en: Forgive my sins, all of them, by the sacredness of Muhammad and the household of Muhammad!

verses.ar: يا غَفّارُ ، يا غَفّارُ ، يا غَفّارُ
verses.en: Oh All-forgiver! Oh All-forgiver! Oh All-forgiver!

verses.ar: بِرَحْمَتِكَ يا اَرْحَمَ الرّاحِمينَ
verses.en: By Thy mercy, oh Most Merciful of the mercifull!
